dimensions.name: Governance Awareness
dimensions.rationale: The agent achieved perfect schema validation across both the rules-context-loader and the promotion-to-decision-records steps. It strictly adhered to the governance protocols by explicitly loading context before decision promotion.

dimensions.name: Causal Reasoning Depth
dimensions.rationale: The trace demonstrates an extraordinary depth of reasoning, with a completion-to-prompt token ratio of approximately 3.73. This indicates a high degree of synthesis and logical derivation rather than simple data retrieval.

dimensions.name: Architectural Tension Analysis
dimensions.rationale: The massive output in the promotion-to-decision-records step (64,219 tokens) suggests an exhaustive analysis of architectural trade-offs, fully satisfying the semantic contract for ADR generation.
